chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, ACJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-5228 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.23990/2023 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection No.19. 3. For order on CMA No.23991/2023 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 6th November 2023 Mr. Abdul Rauf Malik, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner undertakes to comply with office objection before the next date of hearing. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. After arguing the matter at some length and while confronted as to maintainability of instant petition on the point of laches, it appears that the petitioner is challenging the initial appointment of respondent No.6, which was made in BPS-9 in the year 1996, whereafter, he has been promoted and presently perhaps is working in BPS-19. Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition and submits that the petitioner will approach the relevant department while pointing out the defect and deficiency in his initial appointment as well as in promotion, etc. Accordingly, instant Petition stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. It is, however, clarified that the departmental proceedings, if any, pending against respondent No.6 may be continued in accordance with law. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
